title: Online Canvas
description: Sketch, annotate, and refine compositions right inside the site. Includes free drawing, shapes, text, JSON project import/export, and PNG output.

style.applyToSelection: Changing color or stroke width also updates the currently selected object.

projectImport.assetTitlePlaceholder: For example: brand composition draft, character pose sketch, scene layout v1
projectImport.helper: The current canvas will be exported as PNG and saved directly into the selected project's asset library.
projectImport.descriptionEmpty: This project does not have a description yet. You can add one later from the project page.
projectImport.empty: No projects yet. Create one first from the Projects page.
projectImport.login: Log in to save canvas output directly into a project.

board.title: Creative Canvas
board.subtitle: Draw freely on the board or insert shapes, images, and text, then reposition and resize them.
board.hint: Double click text to edit it. Selected objects can be moved, scaled, and rotated.

items.delete: Press Delete or Backspace to remove selected objects.
items.history: Use Ctrl/Cmd + Z for undo, and Ctrl/Cmd + Shift + Z or Ctrl/Cmd + Y for redo.
items.project: Exported project files are JSON and can be imported later to continue editing.
items.png: PNG export keeps the current white canvas background for quick delivery or sharing.

errors.initFailed: Canvas failed to initialize. Please refresh and try again.
errors.projectImportFailed: Project import failed. Please check the file format.
errors.imageImportFailed: Image import failed. Please try another file.
errors.nothingSelected: Select at least one object first.
errors.loadProjectsFailed: Failed to load projects. Please try again later.
errors.saveToProjectFailed: Failed to save into project. Please try again later.
